title: Spain starts evacuating virus-hit cruise ship in Tenerife
summary_full: Spanish passengers are the first to leave the MV Hondius, after an outbreak saw three people die and several infected.
summary_public: Spanish passengers are the first to leave the MV Hondius, after an outbreak saw three people die and several infected.
